identity.styleSentence: A slow-burning ultra-deep international club anthem at 92 BPM featuring massive long-sustain sub-bass anchors, rich cinematic strings led by cello and viola, subtle smoky tenor sax fills, crisp trap-inspired percussion with soft rimshots, lush vocal harmonies, and intimate whispered ad-libs creating a luxurious nightclub atmosphere where the bass quietly speaks back to vocals.
identity.vocalStyle: Intimate whispers transitioning into smooth, emotive singing with layered harmonies
identity.title: Say It With Your Body

lyrics.text:
[Intro]
(Female, whisper)
Closer...
No words...
Come here...
(Bass drops)
[Verse 1 — Male]
Different streets...
Different names...
Different skies...
Same heartbeat...
You smile...
I don't know what to say...
But somehow...
You already know...
[Pre-Chorus — Female]
Your language...
Mine too...
Still...
We're moving...
Like we always knew...
[Chorus]
(Both)
Say it with your body...
Closer...
Say it with your body...
Slower...
Say it with your body...
Move me...
Say it with your body...
Hold me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Don't say maybe...
Just...
Say it with your body...
[Verse 2 — Female]
Every city's got another rhythm...
Every heartbeat finds another home...
You reach for me...
I answer back...
No translation on this road...
[Male]
One small step...
One slow sway...
That's enough...
To tell me everything...
[Pre-Chorus]
(Together)
No dictionary...
No explanation...
Just the music...
And the vibration...
[Drop]
(Instrumental)
Deep sub...
Cello...
Tiny sax response...
Bass wobble...
Strings...
Breathing...
[Chorus 2]
Say it with your body...
Closer...
Say it with your body...
Tighter...
Say it with your body...
Move me...
Say it with your body...
Touch me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Just say it with your body...
[Bridge]
(Female)
When the words don't reach...
(Male)
I'll meet you halfway...
(Female)
When the silence speaks...
(Male)
I'll feel what you say...
(Together)
From Brooklyn...
To Manila...
To Lagos...
To Saigon...
Every heartbeat...
Speaks the same...
[Final Chorus]
Say it with your body...
Slowly...
Say it with your body...
Hold me...
Say it with your body...
Show me...
Say it with your body...
Know me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Make me feel...
Every little heartbeat...
Say it with your body...
Just...
Say it with your body...
[Outro]
(Female whisper over fading cello and sub-bass)
You never had to say a word...
I heard you...

analysis.summary: An intimate R&B anthem exploring universal connection through physical touch and silent understanding across diverse cultures.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Quiet realization of shared soul across distances

keywords.imageryPrompt: Two silhouettes shrinking into a single point of light in a dimly lit luxury lounge, depth of field blurring the background city lights.
A glowing red pulse wave expanding across a dark map connecting Brooklyn to Manila, visualizing sound as light.
Soft focus on fabric textures and skin tones in warm candlelight, capturing the feeling of touch rather than seeing a face.
A vast empty space where sound waves are visible as gentle ripples in dark water, representing unspoken understanding.
Dust motes dancing intensely to an invisible low-frequency hum inside a cathedral-like room with velvet drapes.
A mouth gently closing around a glowing orb of energy in slow motion, capturing the act of taking something precious into oneself.
